history.content:
<thought>
I am at (2, B) facing east. The cell directly ahead is lava (L) at (2, C). To avoid it, I need to change direction. Turning left would face north into a wall, so I will turn right to face south, then move forward into safe cell (3, B). This will start my path south along column B.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (2, B) facing down. The cell directly ahead (3, B) is safe (floor). I plan to move south along column B to row 6, then turn east to reach column H, then go south to the goal at (8, H). For now, I proceed forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (3, B) facing down. The cell ahead (4, B) is safe (floor). I will continue moving forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (4, B) facing down. The cell ahead (5, B) is safe (floor). I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell (5,B) facing down. The cell directly below is (6,B) which is empty floor. That is a safe move. To eventually reach the goal at (8,H), I need to go down first, then turn left to face right, then move east across row6, then turn down again. So my next action is MOVE_FORWARD.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell (6,B) facing down. The cell directly below (7,B) is lava (L), so I cannot move forward. To reach the goal at (8,H), I need to move east along row6. My current orientation is down; turning left will make me face right (east). Then I can move east safely.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell (6,B) facing right. The cells to the east along row6 are all empty floor. I need to reach column H, then go down. So I can move forward repeatedly. My next action is MOVE_FORWARD.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell (6,C) facing right. The next cell to the east (6,D) is empty floor. I continue moving east toward column H.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at cell (6,D) facing right. The cell to the east (6,E) is empty floor. I continue moving east.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (6,E) facing right. The cell east (6,F) is empty floor, so I move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (6,F) facing right. The cell to the east (6,G) is empty floor. I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (6,G) facing right. The cell to the east (6,H) is a safe floor cell. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal at (8,H). I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (6, H) facing right. The cell ahead (6, I) is a wall '#', so I cannot move forward. The goal is at (8, H) directly below. I need to face down to move toward the goal. Turning right from right will face me down.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (6,H) facing down. The cell directly below (7,H) is a safe floor. Moving forward will bring me closer to the goal at (8,H). I will move forward.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (7, H) facing down. The cell directly ahead is (8, H), which is the goal G. Moving forward will reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
